articles.lead_raw: По словам военнослужащего, во время разведки ВС РФ один из солдат противника вышел из подвала за беспилотником, забрал его и убежал обратно

articles.title_en: Marochko reported almost complete control of the Rivne Armed Forces of the Russian Federation
articles.lead_en: Russian troops are expanding the zone of control near the populated area, the expert noted
articles.title_raw: Марочко сообщил о практически полном контроле Ровного ВС РФ
articles.lead_raw: Российские войска расширяют зону контроля у населенного пункта, отметил эксперт

articles.title_en: Russian forces improve positions in Slavyansk direction — DPR head
articles.lead_en: Denis Pushilin says the troops have begun pushing the enemy beyond the Seversky Donets River and the Seversky Donets-Donbass Canal

articles.title_en: Pushilin announced an improvement in the positions of the Russian Armed Forces in the Slavic direction
articles.lead_en: The head of the DPR noted that Russian troops are pushing the Ukrainian Armed Forces beyond the Seversky Donets
articles.title_raw: Пушилин заявил об улучшении позиций ВС РФ на славянском направлении
articles.lead_raw: Глава ДНР отметил, что российские войска вытесняют ВСУ за Северский Донец

articles.title_en: Women on Russia’s military rolls are being summoned to enlistment offices in large numbers, and some are receiving unlawful summonses to reserve training. Here are their options.
articles.lead_en: Russian women on the military register have been summoned to enlistment offices in large numbers since the start of the summer. Some are receiving summonses to military reserve training — something the law explicitly prohibits.
articles.title_raw: Women on Russia’s military rolls are being summoned to enlistment offices in large numbers, and some are receiving unlawful summonses to reserve training. Here are their options.
articles.lead_raw: Russian women on the military register have been summoned to enlistment offices in large numbers since the start of the summer. Some are receiving summonses to military reserve training — something the law explicitly prohibits.

articles.title_en: Fighter Plyashnik: The Russian Armed Forces destroyed 15 hexacopters of the Ukrainian Armed Forces in the Dnepropetrovsk region
articles.lead_en: According to the intelligence officer, military personnel are competing with each other in the number of enemy ground robotic systems shot down.
articles.title_raw: Боец Пляшник: ВС РФ уничтожили 15 гексакоптеров ВСУ в Днепропетровской области
articles.lead_raw: По информации разведчика, военнослужащие между собой соревнуются в количестве сбитых наземных роботизированных комплексов противника

articles.title_en: Marochko: The Russian Armed Forces began to gain a foothold in Osykovo near Konstantinovka
articles.lead_en: Russian military personnel almost completely drove the Ukrainian Armed Forces out of the village, the expert said
articles.title_raw: Марочко: ВС РФ начали закрепляться в Осыкове под Константиновкой
articles.lead_raw: Российские военнослужащие практически полностью выбили ВСУ из населенного пункта, сообщил эксперт

articles.title_en: Marochko reported the offensive of the Russian Armed Forces with a front 20 km near Konstantinovka
articles.lead_en: According to the expert, Russian troops have expanded the zone of control to the west and northeast of the city
articles.title_raw: Марочко сообщил о наступлении ВС РФ фронтом в 20 км у Константиновки
articles.lead_raw: По словам эксперта, российские войска расширили зону контроля к западу и северо-востоку от города
